scale.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white
scale.label: text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-zinc-500 font-semibold

surface_strategies.service_card: relative group overflow-hidden bg-[#121214] border border-white/5 hover:border-white/20 transition-colors duration-500 rounded-2xl p-8

animations.scroll_reveal: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 30 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} viewport={{ once: true, margin: '-100px' }}

hero.layout: min-h-screen flex items-center justify-start relative pt-20
hero.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-[#0A0A0B] via-[#0A0A0B]/80 to-transparent z-10
hero.instructions: Place the background video/image covering the full viewport. Content sits above the overlay gradient so text is highly legible.

services.card_style: Dark Neumorphic/Glass hybrid. Use Industrial Amber for heavy construction icons (Tiefbau, Asphalt) and Fiber Cyan for digital icons (Glasfaser, Kabelverlegung).

projects_portfolio.layout: masonry grid (columns: 1 on mobile, 2 on tablet, 3 on desktop)
projects_portfolio.hover_effect: Image scales up slightly (scale-105) while a dark gradient overlay reveals project title and 'View Project' arrow.

video_showcase.layout: Full-width section with cinematic dark aesthetic.
video_showcase.features: Scroll-triggered reveal of large video card. Autoplay muted on visibility. Uses framer-motion for smooth entry.

contact.elements: Shadcn Form on left (styled dark: bg-transparent, border-white/10), Map and Contact details on right. Include a floating or prominent WhatsApp button (brand green #25D366).

hero_bg.description: Modern highway construction at sunset (moody, premium)

abstract_fiber.description: Abstract streaks of purple and green light (fiber optic)
abstract_fiber.placement: Services Background or Video Showcase background texture

specific_instructions_for_agent: Use Lucide React icons for the services: 'Tractor' or 'HardHat' for Tiefbau/Asphalt, 'Cable' or 'Network' for Glasfaser.
Implement the Header with sticky positioning and crystal glassmorphism.
The Hero CTA 'Request a Quote' (Angebot anfordern) should use a glowing border or solid Fiber Cyan background, while 'Contact Us' (Kontakt) should be an outline button.
Ensure all text remains readable by applying dark gradients behind text that sits over images.

Build the website using pure HTML/Tailwind for the marketing layouts (hero, bento grids) to allow maximum structural freedom, but use Shadcn UI for complex interactive parts like the Contact form or Image lightboxes.
Do NOT use pure #000000, rely on the provided #0A0A0B and #121214.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and forms.
